prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次约32017→32247→45627→43129→49142，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1.7万名；2025年基准约49142名，为近5年最高位次数 字（最难进）；本省物理类计划持续扩招：2021年69人→2022年83人→2023年81人→2024年107人→2025年123人；2026年计划146人，较2025年增加23人（+18 .7%），扩招幅度为近年最大，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第114名（2026年），近年稳定在113-120区间 ，整体层次处于中上游211水平；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现在学校声誉负面事件或投档异常记录中；抖音综合热度排名第101，评价为\"一般\"，短视频平台曝 光量较低，未形成显著报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估中暂无A-及以上等级学科，学科实力以B类为主，整体处于中游水平，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特市，距河北较近，属邻省高校，对河北考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在河北物理类招生规模持续扩大至146人，是 该校在省外的重要生源地；物理类招生专业涵盖计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术、电子信息类、电气工程等当前高热推荐专业，对考生吸引力较强；河北省2026年高考 总报名约60.98万人，较2025年约60.68万人略有增加，物理类考生估算约36.5万人，竞争基数微升；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分持续上升至2025年459分，反映整体 竞争强度逐年加大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招（+18.7%）、考生总数微增及省控线上行等因素；考虑扩招幅度较大但考生竞争基数上升、热门专业吸引力等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次约54956名，区间54456-55456名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated from approximately 32017 to 32247 to 45627 to 43129 to 49142, showing an overall trend of shifting backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17,000 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 49142, the highest ranking number in the past five years (most difficult to enter); the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan has been continuously expanding: 69 in 2021 → 83 in 2022 → 81 in 2023 → 107 in 2024 → 123 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 146, an increase of 23 (+18.7%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which somewhat alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 114th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), stable in the 113-120 range in recent years, overall at the mid-to-upper level of 211 universities; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no negative reputation incidents or abnormal admission records; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 101, rated as "average", with low exposure on short video platforms, not forming a significant application heat signal; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines at A- or above, with discipline strength mainly at B level, overall at a mid-level, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, close to Hebei, a neighboring province university, with some regional appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's Physics Category enrollment scale in Hebei continues to expand to 146, making it an important source of students outside the province; Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, etc., which are currently highly recommended popular majors, with strong appeal to candidates; the total number of Hebei 2026 Gaokao registrants is approximately 609,800, slightly increased from about 606,800 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 365,000, a slight increase in the competition base; regarding the provincial control line, the Physics Category undergraduate batch has continuously risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting a year-on-year increase in overall competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation and backward shift trend, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+18.7%), a slight increase in total candidates, and the upward trend of the provincial control line; taking into account the large expansion but rising competition base and the appeal of popular majors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 54956, with a range of 54456-55456.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 54456-55456, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 54000), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Base); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 55000), it is recommended to mainly apply for mid-range Tier 2 majors, avoiding blind pursuit of popular Tier 1 majors to prevent sliding.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年历史类最低位次约4382→4578→78710→68399→97238，2023年起因八协计划（少数民族计划）专业大幅拉低整体最低位次；普通专业（非八协计划）最 低位次仍在4000-6000名区间；2025年基准约97238名；本省历史类计划持续扩招：2021年22人→2022年35人→2023年37人→2024年41人→2025年48人；2026年 计划59人，较2025年增加11人（+22.9%），扩招幅度为近年最大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第114名（2026年），近年稳定在113-12 0区间；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现在学校声誉负面事件或投档异常记录中；抖音综合热度排名第101，评价为\"一般\"，未形成显著报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估中暂无A-及以上等级学科，学科实力以B类为主，整体处于中游水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业以法学、汉语言文学、历史学、哲学、马克 思主义理论等文科专业为主，其中法学社会热度偏热（分化观望）、汉语言文学为推荐专业；河北省历史类考生2025年约24.37万人，2026年估算约24.51万人，基本持平；省控线 方面，历史类本科批从2021年454分波动上升至2025年477分；内蒙古大学位于邻省呼和浩特，距河北较近，对河北考生有一定地域吸引力；历史类招生规模持续 扩大至59人。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次因八协计划大幅后移、2026年计划继续扩招（+22.9%）、考生总数基本持平等因素；考虑 八协计划占比稳定（约22%）、扩招幅度较大，预计2026年最低录取位次约111009名，区间110509-111509名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4382 → 4578 → 78710 → 68399 → 97238. Starting in 2023, the Eight-Province Cooperation Plan (minority plan) majors significantly lowered the overall minimum ranking; the minimum ranking for regular majors (non-Eight-Province Cooperation Plan) remained in the 4000-6000 range. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 97238. The provincial History Category enrollment plan has been continuously expanding: 2021: 22 students → 2022: 35 → 2023: 37 → 2024: 41 → 2025: 48. The 2026 plan is 59 students, an increase of 11 students (+22.9%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 114th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), stable in the 113-120 range in recent years. The university's reputation has been stable, with no negative reputation events or abnormal admission records. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 101, rated as "average," without forming a significant application heat signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines; discipline strength is mainly B-level, overall at a mid-level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors mainly include law, Chinese language and literature, history, philosophy, Marxist theory, and other liberal arts majors. Among them, law has high social popularity (divergent wait-and-see), and Chinese language and literature is a recommended major. In 2025, there were approximately 243,700 History Category examinees in Hebei Province, estimated at about 245,100 in 2026, basically unchanged. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch fluctuated from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025. Inner Mongolia University is located in the neighboring province of Hohhot, close to Hebei, with some regional appeal to Hebei examinees. History Category enrollment scale continues to expand to 59 students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in historical rankings due to the Eight-Province Cooperation Plan, continued enrollment expansion in 2026 (+22.9%), and basically unchanged total examinee numbers; considering the stable proportion of the Eight-Province Cooperation Plan (about 22%) and the large expansion, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 111009, with a range of 110509-111509.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Rankings within the predicted range of 110509-111509 mainly correspond to the admission range of Eight-Province Cooperation Plan majors; the admission ranking for regular majors (non-Eight-Province Cooperation Plan) remains in the 4000-6000 range, significantly different from the overall minimum ranking. It is recommended that examinees with rankings within the predicted range focus on Tier 3 Eight-Province Cooperation Plan majors as their primary choice; examinees with rankings in the 4000-6000 range can focus on Tier 1 and Tier 2 regular majors, with law, Chinese language and literature, discipline inspection and supervision as sprint targets, and philosophy, sociology, English as safe choices.
